key_findings.detail: CAJA DE SEGUROS S.A. and Experta Aseguradora (state contractors) linked to Werthein family members (Dario, Daniel, Adrian) who appear as OffshoreOfficers. Dario Werthein confirmed in Pandora Papers as board member of Ducal Investments Limited (BVI). Mother Norma Gold de Werthein is beneficiary of Hinslet Overseas Ltd (BVI, 1997).
contractors: Experta Aseguradora de Riesgos del Trabajo S.A.
Experta Aseguradora de Riesgos del Trabajo

key_findings.finding: Sergio Drucaroff dual role: Subsecretario + Contractor
key_findings.detail: Sergio Alejandro Drucaroff appears as both a Contractor (CUIT 20280336689) and linked to GovernmentAppointment as Subsecretario, plus CompanyOfficer roles. Was Subsecretario de Gestion Productiva (2016-2018) and Subsecretario de Compre Argentino (2018-2019) at Ministry of Production.

key_findings.finding: Diego Moix incompatibility: Director INADI + state contractor
key_findings.detail: Diego Javier Moix appears as Contractor and GovernmentAppointment (Director). Was Director at INADI while simultaneously receiving audit contracts from Ministry of Science. The Anti-Corruption Office did not flag this.

key_findings.finding: SACDE S.A. linked to Pablo Clusellas (Secretario Legal y Tecnico)
key_findings.detail: SACDE S.A. (contractor CUIT 30568457451) has CompanyOfficer Pablo Clusellas who simultaneously held government appointment as Secretario. Clusellas was Secretary of Legal and Technical Affairs under Macri (2015-2019), childhood friend of the president.

key_findings.finding: Mariano Recalde: Aerolineas + Optar as state contractors
key_findings.detail: Aerolineas Argentinas and Optar (its travel agency subsidiary) both appear as state contractors with Mariano Recalde as CompanyOfficer/BoardMember linked to Politician node. Under Recalde, all government travel was mandated to go through Optar from 2013. No financial statements were ever published.
contractors: Optar Operador Mayorista de Servicios Turisticos S. A.

key_findings.finding: BICE bank: 5 politicians on board while state contractor
key_findings.detail: Banco de Inversion y Comercio Exterior (BICE) is a state contractor with board members/officers linked to 5 politicians: Frigerio, Domina, Bossio, De Mendiguren, Fabrissin.
contractors: BANCO DE INVERSION Y COMERCIO EXTERIOR (BICE)

key_findings.detail: 8 contractors also donated to political parties. PROVIDERS SA, Esteban Manuel Rodriguez, ILEANA LETICIA AGUIRRE, Alberto Rios donated to Frente de Todos 2019. TOMAS HNOS Y CIA S.A., ADRIANA ELIZABETH TISIOTTO donated to Juntos por el Cambio 2019. Cross-party contractor-donor pattern.

key_findings.finding: Frente de Todos donor linked to offshore officer
key_findings.detail: Jose Luis Perez, a Frente de Todos 2019 donor, is CROSS_REFERENCED to JOSE LUIS PEREZ (OffshoreOfficer). Co-donors in the same party (PROVIDERS SA, Esteban Manuel Rodriguez, ILEANA LETICIA AGUIRRE) are all state contractors.

key_findings.finding: AR-SAT massive revolving door: 20+ government officials as company officers
key_findings.detail: EMPRESA ARGENTINA DE SOLUCIONES SATELITALES S.A. (AR-SAT) has the highest concentration of CompanyOfficers who also hold GovernmentAppointments, including Presidente, Subsecretario, Director Nacional, Director Titular, Sindico positions.
contractors: EMPRESA ARGENTINA DE SOLUCIONES SATELITALES S.A. AR-SAT

key_findings.finding: CONUAR (nuclear fuel contractor) extensive government personnel overlap
key_findings.detail: CONUAR S.A. (Combustibles Nucleares Argentinos) shows 15+ officers with simultaneous government appointments spanning Gerente, Subgerente, Jefe de Departamento, Vicepresidente roles.

key_findings.finding: Federico Pinedo linked to Tesam Argentina S.A.
key_findings.detail: Tesam Argentina S.A. has Federico Pinedo (former President of the Senate, provisional President of Argentina) as CompanyOfficer and BoardMember, linked via MAYBE_SAME_AS to Politician node.

key_findings.finding: Rodriguez Giavarini at Peugeot Citroen Argentina
key_findings.detail: Adalberto Rodriguez Giavarini (former Foreign Affairs Minister) appears as CompanyOfficer/BoardMember of Peugeot Citroen Argentina S.A., a state contractor.

key_findings.finding: MARKETING Y COMUNICACION POLITICA S.A. linked to Diego Santilli
key_findings.detail: State contractor linked to Diego Cesar Santilli (PRO politician, former Buenos Aires Vice Governor) as both BoardMember and CompanyOfficer.
